title: ILP 风险归属 / Who bears ILP risk
point: ILP 投资风险由保单持有人承担,无资本保证。 / The policyholder bears the investment risk; no capital guarantee.
keyfacts: 价值随基金浮动 / Value follows the funds
sourceRef: MAS Notice 307 (ILP disclosure/fund/fee); suitability per FAA advisory process (FAA-N16 / reasonable basis)

title: ILP 披露 / ILP disclosure
point: 披露收费、基金信息与风险;设冷静期。 / Disclose fees, fund info and risks; free-look applies.
keyfacts: 管理费/分销费 / Mgmt/distribution fees
sourceRef: MAS Notice 307 (ILP disclosure/fund/fee); suitability per FAA advisory process (FAA-N16 / reasonable basis)
